entry.title: New: RES25-162 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
IDENTIFYING THE DEDICATED SOURCE OF REVENUE AND PLEDGE TO REPAY LOANS WITH INTEREST AND LOAN FEE PROVIDED BY THE STATE OF HAWAIʻI (STATE) WATER POLLUTION CONTROL REVOLVING FUND FOR VARIOUS WASTEWATER CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS.

Resolution authorizing the receipt and expenditure of monies for the He’eia Wastewater Pump Station Improvements and Honouliuli WWTP Effluent Treatment and Outfall Improvements projects provided by the State Water Pollution Control Revolving Fund in the form of a loan agreement between the State of Hawaii and the City and County of Honolulu.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
